name: goal-setter
description: Shape rough requests into compact Codex goals that define the expected result, evidence, constraints, stop rules, artifact reuse, and when to return a user-sent /goal for spawn_agent or create_thread.

interface.shortDescription: Codex goals with evidence and run rules
interface.longDescription: Turns a rough request into a compact /goal for Codex: expected result, evidence, constraints, stop rules, existing artifact reuse, adversarial verification when useful, and whether a user-sent /goal line is required to launch spawn_agent or create_thread. It asks only when missing information would change the result, evidence, scope, validation, or risk.
defaultPrompt: Set a goal: define the expected result, evidence, constraints, and how Codex should run it.
Draft a Codex-ready goal for this task without activating it.
Shape this review or splittable work into a goal that uses subagents or create_thread only when needed.
